steps.title: Upload your logo file
steps.description: Provide a clean vector or high-resolution logo on a simple background.

steps.title: Select or describe target materials
steps.description: Choose metals, fabrics, liquids, glass, stone, neon, or custom textures aligned with your brand.

steps.title: Generate logo x material variations
steps.description: AI renders your logo as if it were made from chosen materials, with realistic lighting and depth.

steps.title: Export assets for campaigns and brand systems
steps.description: Use visuals in hero banners, social posts, packaging explorations, and presentation decks.

items.question: What is the Brand Logo x Material workflow?
items.answer: It is an AI workflow that turns flat logos into material-based visuals—metals, glass, fabric, stone, liquid, and more—for brand assets and campaigns.

items.question: Who should use this?
items.answer: Brand designers, marketers, agencies, and packaging teams who need quick, high-quality logo treatments and explorations.

items.question: What inputs do I need?
items.answer: Upload a clean logo file and describe the materials or textures you want to explore. Optionally add brand mood or references.

items.question: What does the output look like?
items.answer: High-quality logo visuals rendered as if made from your chosen materials, suitable for presentations and campaign mockups.

items.question: Can I try multiple styles?
items.answer: Yes. You can explore multiple material directions and iterate quickly until you find the best brand fit.

items.question: How are credits used?
items.answer: Each generation consumes credits based on complexity and resolution. You can iterate within your plan and export selected results.
